name: Fortnite: Taco Bowl LVIII Tournament
overview: Fortnite Taco Bowl is a 1V1 arena boxfight tournament that determines the most quick thinking players in all of Fortnite. Prepare your taste buds and fill up on ammo for a culinary adventure of epic proportions. In this rapid fire 1v1 boxfight you'll need to enter a fancy taco restaurant and eliminate the opposing player as fast as possible before they get to you first.

trailers.title: Fortnite: Taco Bowl LVIII Tournament - Launch Trailer (FNTB)
